flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College of Technology at Canton rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.6k → $6.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College of Technology at Canton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
